title: Legendary Monsters
description: New early, middle, late game bosses
body:
![Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bc586741cae9c9797e2cb40f9fecede41d9bd7c.png)
 
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/963858a7d583caec0b1cc6fcdaaeb51e6c523fa1.png)
![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/450a580c73a90c5b68b9173960fcdbd052ab60c8.png)
![patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ffe4398cf271fa5dd8f1afc9a2d68c79ed8e5b3.png)

https://discord.gg/HXsBBYbQsE

Support LM on Patreon, and gain beta version access:
https://www.patreon.com/cw/MiauczelsMods

Mod Content:

 
Mobs:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

<Skeletosaurus:

This is a prehistoric beast that lives in its nest in soul sand valley biome. if you manage to beat it you will be rewarded with minimum of 2 dinosaur bones, you can use these bones to craft The Dinosaur Bone Club, or Dinosaur Bone Shield



<Warped Fungussus:

Warped Fungussus is a warped mushroom like entity that lives in warped forest. It teleports after its attack, when beat it drops Warped Mushroom cap part, it can be used to create the entity warper item.



<Endersent:

Endersent is a very dangerous entity, it deals a lot of damage and teleports after the attack. It can also give chorus infection effect to players. As a reward player can get the Chorus Crystal. this item allows player to craft The Chorus Blade, or The Chorus Mask.



<Chorusling:

Chrosuling is a mob similar to Endersent but its much less dangerous, it can drop Infected Chorus Fruit, which can be used to craft Chorus Mask or Void Entity Warper.



<Lava Eater

Lava Eater is a big lizard that is immune to fire. It can set its enemies on fire and it drops 3 pieces of its skin, from these 3 pieces of lava eater's skin you can craft yourself the Fiery Jaw weapon.



<Shulker Mimic

Shulker Mimic is a big shulker - like mob that can be found in shulker tower structure. it gives levitation effect to its enemies. It drops large shulker shell item, from this item you can craft Shulker Helmet or A Shulker Shield. When he reaches 50% of health he starts applying Gravity Pull effect to his enemies. When he reaches 25% of health he will start applying levitation and Gravity Pull effect but stronger.



<Frostbitten Golem

Frostbitten Golem is a big frozen golem that can be found in snowy and cold biomes. When beat it drops Frozen Rune, which can be used to craft The Great Frost or Frostbitten Shield.


<Overgrown Colossus

Overgrown Colossus is is.. is just overgrown. it lives deep in the heart of the jungle. It can give posion effect to players. When killed it drops nature crystal, it can be used to craft Mossy Hammer or Mossy Chestplate, he will spawn Mossy Golem when he reaches 50% of health or 25%.



<Withered Abomination
Withered Abomination is a big scary wither - like mob that lives in the forgotten long time ago Soul Fortress Remains Structure. it drops WIthered bones. The bones are used to make Withered Scythe or Withered Ribcage.



 

<Cloud Golem:

Cloud Golem is another golem in this mod. it summons big explosive clouds above its enemies. It has 2 phases. In the second phase it becomes more angry and starts fightning using its 2 arms and summoning lightning bolts. It drops Air Rune which can be used to craft Wand Of Clouds or Atmospheric Boots, or Axe of Lightning.


 

Ancient Guardian is a big and scary monster with many visible ribs. It deals a lot of damage and it can slow its enemies because of how hard its attacks are, be careful when hitting him because even when you hurt him it can hurt you. It drops Anchor Handle. Anchor Handle can be used to craft Monstrous Anchor or Spiky Shield.


 

<Ambusher

Ambusher is a mob that attacks players using its long tongue, when defeated it splits into 3 little worms. When defeated it also drops 1 piece of its tough skin, which can be used to craft Spiky Shield.


 

<Spiky Bug

Spiky bug is a small but very annoying worm that lurks around Ancient Stronghold structure, it drops Ancient Spike. Ancient Spike can be used to craft Spiky Shield.


 

<Haunted Knight

 Haunted Knight is a living armor with a sword and shield. It spawns in Abandoned Crypt Structure.



 

<Haunted Guard

 Haunted Guard is another living armor but it is using Golden Halberd as a weapon. He also spawns in abandoned crypt.



 

<Posessed Paladin

 Posessed Paladin is a big Living armor with large netherite sword, Posessed paladin will stun you when you are not careful enought, it can apply Broken Armor Effect as well. Posessed Paladin has 2 phases,

in the first one he has normal texture, and in the second one he has golden texture and starts applying Bleeding effect to his enemies.

 

 

<Skeloraptor

 Skeloraptor is a friendly creature that can be hatched from skeletosaurus egg. Once its hatched you have to tame it with Raw Beef and wait until it's fully grown to be able to ride it. It's a very fast transport, and it can jump higher than horses. To make Skeletosaurus egg hatch faster, you have to place it on soul sand. This mob is also regenerating naturally.



 

<Guard

 Guard is a neutral creature that can be brought to life after defeating Posessed Paladin using Guard Summoner item. You have to tame it using iron ingots. Once its tamed it will  attack every  entity you want him to attack. You can also Change its armor colour by holding shift + right click and holding [Iron Ingot or Gold Ingot or Diamond, or Emerald, or Amethyst, or Copper, or Echo Shard, or Netherite Ingot] at the same time. you can make it stay or follow you by right clicking, its also regenerating naturally, it has less damage points than the Knight but it can perform attacks on longer distance, and it has big knockback.



 

<Knight

   Knight is a neutral creature that can be brought to life after defeating Posessed Paladin using Knight Summoner item. You have to tame it using iron ingots. Once its tamed it will  attack every  entity you want him to attack. You can also Change its armor colour by holding shift + right click and holding [Iron Ingot or Gold Ingot or Diamond, or Emerald, or Amethyst, or Copper, or Echo Shard, or Netherite Ingot] at the same time. you can make it stay or follow you by right clicking, its also regenerating naturally, it has more damage points than the Guard, and he is performing attacks on shorter distances, and he has smaller knockback.


</details>
